description_long: This is a modern L-shaped desk with a two-tone design, featuring a light woodgrain surface and a white or light beige frame. The main work surface is spacious, supporting a large desktop computer, keyboard, mouse, and a closed laptop, with ample room for additional items. The secondary, shorter section of the desk extends perpendicularly, providing extra workspace and housing a smaller monitor or tablet. The desk has clean, minimalist lines with rounded corners and a solid panel on one side, while the other side is open for legroom. The construction appears sturdy, likely using engineered wood or laminate for the surfaces and a composite or metal frame for support. There are no visible drawers, handles, or cable management features, emphasizing a sleek and uncluttered appearance.
description: A modern L-shaped desk with a light woodgrain top and white frame, featuring a spacious main surface and a secondary side extension for extra workspace. The design is minimalist and sturdy, suitable for computer work and multitasking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main work surface with a desktop computer and the side extension with a smaller monitor.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the desk's depth, the computer monitor's profile, and the open legroom beneath the main surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the desk, both monitors, and the clean, uninterrupted woodgrain surfaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid panel of the side extension and the arrangement of devices on the desk.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long, open section of the L-shape, with the main work surface and computer monitor directly accessible. The solid panel marks the side extension, while the open area beneath the main surface provides legroom.
